roles.name: AI PM
roles.title: Product Manager
roles.description: The generalist. You ship, you align, you survive. Base stats.

roles.name: AI TPM
roles.title: Technical PM
roles.description: Closer to the model. Stronger delivery, less political runway. Unlocked after your first win.

roles.name: AI Program Lead
roles.title: Program Lead
roles.description: Strategic, cross-functional, accountable for everything. Higher trust floor, slower delivery. Unlocked after 5 wins.

difficulties.name: Normal
difficulties.description: Standard AI PM experience. Painful but fair.

difficulties.name: Understaffed
difficulties.description: Team starts depleted. Two engineers are on PTO.

difficulties.name: Skeptical Board
difficulties.description: Trust starts low. The board has questions from last quarter.

difficulties.name: High Stakes
difficulties.description: Start with a Tech Debt Bomb in your hotbar. Good luck.

difficulties.name: Strict Compliance
difficulties.description: Risk/Compliance game-over threshold reduced to 8 instead of 10.

difficulties.name: Lean Inventory
difficulties.description: Hotbar capped at 5 slots. Every item slot counts.

difficulties.name: Speed Chess
difficulties.description: Delivery Speed starts at 25. The sprint is already behind.

difficulties.name: Chaos Mode
difficulties.description: All stat deltas are amplified by 1.5×. Big swings, both ways.

difficulties.name: Iron PM
difficulties.description: No items can be activated. You are the item.

locations.name: Standup Room
locations.description: The daily grind. Where velocity goes to die.

locations.name: War Room
locations.description: Incidents only. Someone set up a secondary Slack channel.

locations.name: Client Call
locations.description: Enterprise prospect on the line. Every word is being recorded.

locations.name: Demo Stage
locations.description: Lights up. Mic on. No second takes.

levelUnlocks.11: Boss encounters now trigger — Demo Day (Day 4), Model Incident (Day 5), Procurement (Day 3)
levelUnlocks.16: AI TPM role eligible (requires 1 win to activate)
levelUnlocks.17: Lean Inventory + Speed Chess difficulties unlocked
levelUnlocks.19: AI Program Lead role eligible (requires 5 wins)
levelUnlocks.20: Chaos Mode + Iron PM unlocked · Demo Stage location · LEGENDARY STATUS

dailyModifiers.title: All-Hands Day
dailyModifiers.description: CEO is presenting the company vision. All other meetings cancelled. So is productivity.

dailyModifiers.title: Sprint Planning Day
dailyModifiers.description: Estimates are due. Estimates are wrong. This is known and accepted.

dailyModifiers.title: Prod Deploy Last Night
dailyModifiers.description: Someone pushed to prod at 11 PM. The on-call engineer is technically fine.

dailyModifiers.title: Evals Came Back Clean
dailyModifiers.description: For once, the numbers are good. Enjoy it. Something else will break.

dailyModifiers.title: Quarterly Business Review
dailyModifiers.description: Leadership wants a progress update on every initiative. In a slide deck. Due by noon.

dailyModifiers.title: Cloud Provider Incident
dailyModifiers.description: AWS is having elevated error rates in your region. Staging is down. Production is fine. For now.

dailyModifiers.title: New Engineer Onboarding
dailyModifiers.description: A senior engineer joins today. They will reveal how many things have no documentation.

dailyModifiers.title: Competitor Just Launched
dailyModifiers.description: A competitor released something. It is trending. The CEO forwarded the article with '?'.

dailyModifiers.title: Post-Offsite Energy
dailyModifiers.description: Yesterday was the team offsite. Morale is high. So is the action item count.

dailyModifiers.title: Budget Freeze Announced
dailyModifiers.description: Finance sent an email. New tooling requests are paused. Existing licenses under review.
